Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE

Page Updated:Wed May 3rd, 2017

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Ultra Rare
Level to Attain: 46
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Plane of Fear
NPC Name
a gorgon
Wraith of a Shissar

Plane of Fear 2.0
NPC Name
a gorgon - PoF 2.0

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

The Plane of Knowledge
Quest Name
Planar Armor Exchange

Zone Name
Plane of Fear
Plane of Fear 2.0

Vermiculated Tunic item window 2017

Uploaded October 28th, 2017 by snailish
Send a correction
Post Comment
Comparably speaking....
QuoteReply
# May 09 2003 at 4:49 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779764302
Scholar
18 posts
I'm not disparaging this peice of gear, it is a nice item.... however, the Elysian's tunic has better wis, and some decent stats on it (UP is a little chancy to get to unless you know what you're doing though)... the Quest armor (Thurg, Kael, Twighlight(hmm, maybe)) IMHO seems to be comprable as well, given the stats and bonuses and effects that go with them. A PoF raid for this peice of gear? I don't think that all you druids (yes, I have a druid too) should plan to spend alot of time in PoF waiting for this stuff to drop.. if you've got that much time on your hands, squat in Kael for raids, and up your CoV for Skyshrine armor at the same time.

If,however, you justhappen to be in PoF for a raid, and it drops, Gratz to you, in that event, if it's better than what you've already got, roll it.

That's just IMHO
▲ Page top
RE: Comparably speaking....
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2004 at 9:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1691972204718
Scholar
51 posts
Remember, pieces like this are the original Planer armors in the game. When these came out, they were so far ahead of anything else in the game it was hard to believe. I know that now I look at Thorny Vine armor and almost laugh at it when compared with most high level equipment, but I very easily remember the first time that stuff got found, it was the coolest things rangers had ever seen. I personally think the powercreep in the game is destroying it, I would love it if this kind of planar equipment was still the top of the line, but oh well.
▲ Page top
RE: Comparably speaking....
QuoteReply
# May 02 2004 at 3:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966261150
35 posts
I couldn't agree more with you k. I miss the old days when duel weilding my icepaw war claw and frozen long sword, and wearing all etched ivy ment my ranger was really decked out. In a way I also miss there not being pok or the translocaters. It ment people usually found places to hunt in the area where they were. Now people just follow the same path everytime and have forgoten about 85% of the zones in the game.
▲ Page top
dont destroy it!
QuoteReply
# Nov 18 2002 at 3:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775262640
18 posts
Take it to the Heirophant guy in PoK. I got a Raw Diamond for a piece yesterday... not bad considerin it was no-drop and I wasn't about to give up my ES Vambs for the slinky little Vermi arms...
▲ Page top
nice tunic
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2002 at 11:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762349640
View User Forum
52 posts
got mine in a pick-up/open raid to Fear that a friend invited me to. Thx Lalandraa :) dropped off the first gorgon we killed, couldn't beleive it. won the roll between the only 2 druids on the raid, then picked up a pair of the boots to go with it a little while later.
all in all, it makes an awesome upgrade to my imbued elven chainmail i was wearing. i dont care what people say, this thing is not junk, its just older than all the "broken" gear luclin introduced. the PoH bp may be better, but im proud to be wearing my old school 13wis vermi tunic.

...not too mention i can now do one hell of a ranger impression if i pull out my gimp parrying dagger! :)

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 30 2001 at 3:19 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You ******* moron. Your druid is only 35, you cant even get into PoF yet, stupid ***, so how in the hell are you supposed to loot this no drop item, to be able to wear it? Some people's ignorance just pisses me off
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 13 2001 at 6:39 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why o why do you have to flame that other guy? He said it would be nice for his 35 druid, ofcourse it would be nice, i'd love to have it myself (21 atm) I know I can't have it for at least another 16 levels, but i'd love to have it right now none the less.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 16 2001 at 1:39 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i really love this item it rocks my 35 druid needs the wis and the hp are nice just incase the strgh helps stam is great 13 wis is cool to 15ac i think this itemis great for anyone who can getit
